Fetch and display details for a specific CircleCI job.

Requires the project slug and job number. The job number can be
obtained from 'circleci job list' (the job_number field).


JSON Fields:
  id, name, project_slug, status, type, started_at, stopped_at, job_number, approval_request_id, approval_name, dependencies

Usage:
  job get <job-number> [flags]

Examples:
# Get job details:
$ circleci job get 42 --project github/myorg/myrepo

# Get as JSON:
$ circleci job get 42 --project github/myorg/myrepo --json

# Get job status:
$ circleci job get 42 --project github/myorg/myrepo --jq '.status'


Flags:
  -h, --help                help for get
      --jq expression       Filter JSON output with a jq expression
  -j, --json                Output as JSON
      --plain               Plain text output (tab-separated, no color)
      --project string      Project slug (e.g. github/myorg/myrepo)
      --template template   Format output using a Go template
